metadata.title: Medigize | Premium Medical Travel & Global Healthcare
metadata.description: Experience world-class healthcare without boundaries. Medigize connects you with top-tier clinics and specialists worldwide. Seamless medical travel tailored for you.
metadata.ogDescription: Your journey to health starts here. Quality care, globally recognized specialists, and seamless travel support.

hero.title: World-Class Care,
hero.subtitle: Anywhere on Earth.
hero.description: Experience healthcare without borders. We bridge the gap between global specialists and patients seeking premium, affordable medical treatments worldwide.

services.title: Comprehensive Support
services.description: Everything you need for a stress-free medical journey.

matching.title: Specialist Matching
matching.description: Access top 1% of surgeons and doctors curated for your specific needs.

logistics.title: Travel Logistics
logistics.description: Full coordination of flights, accommodation, and medical visas.

postCare.title: Post-Care Support
postCare.description: Continuous monitoring and rehabilitation coordination back home.

cta.title: Ready for better health?
cta.description: Join thousands of patients who found elite medical care abroad with Medigize.
